title: 篝火（單一場景真動態）
audio_prompt: campfire crackling, gentle wood pops and soft flame hiss, calm night forest ambience, field recording, high quality, no music
video_prompt: Static camera close-up shot of a campfire burning steadily at dusk, orange flames flickering gently over stacked logs, soft warm firelight on surrounding stones, softly blurred dark forest background with shallow depth of field, photorealistic, cinematic, no camera movement
negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, people, hands, camera shake, fast motion, scene change, cartoon, illustration, low quality, distortion, noise, mosaic, pixelated, grainy, static noise, compression artifacts
